problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: If Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors is applied to it, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
